name: Toolhouse API
what_it_does: Toolhouse is a cloud platform that gives AI agents a managed store of tools to use. Instead of implementing tool integrations manually, agents call the Toolhouse API to get pre-built, maintained tools for web search, code execution, email, databases, and more — with usage tracking and auth handled by Toolhouse.
use_cases: Adding pre-built tools (search, code execution, email) to agents without custom implementation
Consistent tool availability across different LLM providers
Tool usage analytics and monitoring in multi-agent systems
Rapid agent prototyping without building each tool integration from scratch
Cloud-executed tools that don't count against local compute or context
not_for: Teams with strict data residency requirements
Use cases requiring tool execution to stay on-premise
best_when: You want to add common tools to your agent quickly without implementing each integration, and you're fine with cloud-executed tool calls.
avoid_when: You need custom tools, on-premise execution, or enterprise compliance today.

auth.notes: Simple API key authentication. Keys are per-project. No granular scopes.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier with limited tool calls; specific limits vary by tool
pricing.paid_tiers: Usage-based pricing per tool call. Exact pricing not public.
pricing.notes: Free tier suitable for development. Production pricing requires contacting Toolhouse.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Error messages are functional but documentation on error codes is limited. Tool-specific errors include context about what failed.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No idempotency guarantees on tool calls.
known_agent_gotchas: Early-stage company — API stability is not guaranteed
Tool quality varies by integration — test each tool thoroughly before production
Rate limits not publicly documented — risk of production surprises
Tool call results pass through Toolhouse's servers — data privacy consideration
Limited tool catalog compared to ACI.dev (but growing)
agent_readiness.security_notes: Early-stage security posture. Tool call data passes through Toolhouse cloud. No formal compliance certifications yet.
